action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Pesticide use not in accordance with label or applicable laws. Prohibited chemical used/stored. Open bait station used.
Raw, cooked or prepared food is adulterated, contaminated, cross-contaminated, or not discarded in accordance with HACCP plan.
Food Protection Certificate not held by supervisor of food operations.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Cold food item held above 41º F (smoked fish and reduced oxygen packaged foods above 38 ºF) except during necessary preparation.

Plumbing not properly installed or maintained; anti-siphonage or backflow prevention device not provided where required; equipment or floor not properly drained; sewage disposal system in disrepair or not functioning properly.
